name: webship
description: Reviews and ships production websites — audits existing sites, and builds + deploys new ones (React + shadcn/ui) to GitHub and Vercel.

interface.shortDescription: Reviews and ships production websites — audits existing sites, and builds + deploys new ones (React + shadcn/ui) to GitHub and Vercel.
interface.longDescription: Reviews and ships production websites — audits existing sites, and builds + deploys new ones (React + shadcn/ui) to GitHub and Vercel. Runs hosted; install to use it.
